summary: Created careerspan-resume-intake skill with full processing pipeline

artifacts.description: Skill documentation following Agent Skills spec
Main processing script - extracts candidate info, matches to job openings, creates Airtable records, generates guides, uploads to Drive

features_implemented: PDF resume text extraction via PyMuPDF
LLM-based candidate info extraction (name, email, skills, experience)
Airtable job opening query and LLM-based matching
Candidate guide generation via existing careerspan-candidate-guide skill
Google Drive upload to shared folder structure

decisions: Used /zo/ask for all semantic work (extraction, matching, classification) per LLM-over-regex principle
Delegated candidate guide generation to existing careerspan-candidate-guide skill rather than duplicating
Created temporary JD file from job opening metadata for candidate guide skill compatibility
Used shared folder structure: <root>/<employer>/candidates/<candidate_name>/ for Drive uploads
lessons_for_ledger: The existing careerspan-candidate-guide skill expects --jd-file to be a text file with the full JD, so when matching dynamically, we create a temporary JD from the job opening metadata
